message: Reused a single ExpressionEvaluator per InterpreterEvaluator execution context and added an interpreter expression BenchmarkDotNet benchmark.

Verified evaluator reuse: ExpressionEvaluator is constructed once per InterpreterEvaluator and reused for recursive expression evaluation; state remains frame/context-bound. Benchmark added at benchmarks/SafeIR.Benchmarks/Interpreter/InterpreterExpressionBenchmarks.cs with MemoryDiagnoser and 10,000-iteration arithmetic loop. Validation passed: focused interpreter tests (29 passed), benchmark project build (0 warnings, 0 errors), agentq doctor ok.
command: dotnet test tests/SafeIR.Tests/SafeIR.Tests.csproj --filter FullyQualifiedName~InterpreterAndPolicyTests|FullyQualifiedName~LogicalShortCircuitTests|FullyQualifiedName~GoldenCorpusTests|FullyQualifiedName~DifferentialFuzzTests; dotnet build benchmarks/SafeIR.Benchmarks/SafeIR.Benchmarks.csproj; ./scripts/agentq.ps1 doctor
